---
title: "Airline Crashes Event Study"
subtitle: "Event study analysis of airline crashes and impact on airlines & manufacturers' stock performance"
author: "Ebrahim Alhaddad"
date: "Dec 15, 2025"
image: airline.png

format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Presentation
{{< video https://youtu.be/XJM9t-dbRZA >}}

## Deck
{{< pdf airline.pdf width=100% height=450 >}}

## Github
[View repository on GitHub](https://github.com/ebrahimAlhaddad/airline-event-study)
